programme.title: Nocny lot
programme.desc: After returning from Beijing, British doctor Matthew Nolan (Richard Armitage) is accused of committing murder in the Chinese capital.He is sure that he was tricked into this crime.Meanwhile, due to the extradition provision, he must be transported back to the Middle Kingdom.He is to be escorted by London policewoman Hana Li (Jing Lusi).It is not possible for them to take a long flight in peace.The conspiracy in which the doctor is involved escalates on board the plane.There are also more murders.The series takes place during an overnight flight between London and Beijing Dr. Matthew Nolan goes to a medical conference in Beijing.While visiting a nightclub, he is involved in a life-threatening incident.After returning to London, at the airport, he is arrested by the British services.When officers find a stab wound on his body, the man is accused of killing a woman in Beijing, a woman named Shen Zhao.MI5 Director General Madeline Delaney reluctantly agrees to a request from the Chinese Trade Minister to extradite a man due to ongoing negotiations over the Sino-British nuclear energy program.Nolan is to be escorted to China by policewoman Hana Li.

programme.title: Red Eye 2
programme.desc: A British doctor is arrested for murder on his way to Beijing.Three women become involved in a conspiracy.DS Hana Li and Agent Clay Brody must track down the killer to prevent the plane from being shot down.

programme.title: Red Eye 2
programme.desc: A British doctor is arrested for murder on his way to Beijing.Three women become involved in a conspiracy.DS Hana Li and Agent Clay Brody must track down the killer to prevent the plane from being shot down.

programme.title: Red Eye 2
programme.desc: A British doctor is arrested for murder on his way to Beijing.Three women become involved in a conspiracy.DS Hana Li and Agent Clay Brody must track down the killer to prevent the plane from being shot down.

programme.title: Red Eye 2
programme.desc: A British doctor is arrested for murder on his way to Beijing.Three women become involved in a conspiracy.DS Hana Li and Agent Clay Brody must track down the killer to prevent the plane from being shot down.

programme.title: Red Eye 2
programme.desc: A British doctor is arrested for murder on his way to Beijing.Three women become involved in a conspiracy.DS Hana Li and Agent Clay Brody must track down the killer to prevent the plane from being shot down.

programme.title: Kinds of Kindness
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated stories.Emma Stone, Jesse Plemons and Willem Dafoe play various roles.A corporate manager (Jesse Plemons) lives under the dictates of an eccentric boss (Willem Dafoe).She puts his well-being above her own and doesn't question any outlandish demands.Stripped of his dignity, he tries to free himself from total control.A policeman (Jesse Plemons) misses his wife (Emma Stone) - a biologist who disappeared during a research expedition.A woman who survived the disaster returns, but her marriage is put to the test.The husband becomes paranoid and is not sure whether this is the same beloved he once married.The heroes of the last story are members of a sect who are looking for a person with the power to resurrect the dead.The work of Yórgos Lánthimos - the director of "Poor Creatures", which won four Oscars.For his performance, Jesse Plemons was awarded the Palme d'Or at Cannes.

programme.title: Shock Docs: Ghosts of Flight 401
programme.desc: On December 29, 1972, Eastern Airlines Flight 401 crashed in the Florida Everglades.100 people died.Soon after, there were reports of encounters with the spirits of people who died on that flight.For the first time, on the 50th anniversary of the crash, paranormal investigator Steve Shippy and medium Cindy Kaza will try to make contact with the spirits of Flight 401 and find out the truth about what really happened that fateful night.The Flight 401 case is one of the greatest supernatural mysteries in US history.

programme.title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
programme.desc: Orphaned Harry Potter is raised by his Uncle Vernon and Aunt Petunia.His guardians don't care about him, and his cousin Dudley constantly teases him.One day, a mysterious letter arrives to Harry.His relatives do not allow him to read it because it reveals the secret of his origins.However, on his eleventh birthday, the boy learns the truth.It turns out that he is the son of a pair of magicians who were killed by the wizard Voldemort.To his surprise, Harry also discovers that he has inherited extraordinary abilities from his parents.He receives an invitation to study at Hogwarts, the school of magic.His life changes completely.Once there, Harry is surprised to discover that he is famous in the wizarding community.At school, he makes friends with his peers, Ron and Hermione.Together with them, he tries to discover the secret of the philosopher's stone hidden within the walls of the academy.They experience many adventures together.Potter must face the enemy who contributed to the death of his loved ones.

programme.title: The Last Showgirl
programme.desc: After thirty years, dancer Shelly Gardner (Pamela Anderson) ends her career.For decades, she performed in a strip revue in Las Vegas, which was inspired by French burlesque.The stage, costumes and music are her passion, for which she sacrificed her family life and relationship with her daughter, Hannah (Billie Lourd).She shared her knowledge and experience with beginner friends Marianne (Brenda Song) and Jodie (Kiernan Shipka).One day, however, producer Eddie (Dave Bautista) announces that the show has been canceled.A devastated Shelly must re-plan her future.A similar fate will befall her friend Annette (Jamie Lee Curtis), a dealer at an arcade.Golden Globe for Pamela Anderson.

programme.title: War for the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: The situation of the mutant monkeys changes with the appearance of a formation led by the Colonel, which seeks to take control of the apes.Meanwhile, Blue Eyes informs his father that he has found a place for their tribe to live.The decision is made to march.Under the cover of darkness, an attack occurs.Caesar's son and wife are killed.Despite the tragedy, the primate leader believes in the success of a peaceful solution.On his own, he searches for the person responsible for the massacre, but falls into the hands of the enemy.He then finds out that his compatriots were forced to work as slaves.People are attacked by a virus that reverses the process of evolution.The final showdown is inevitably approaching.

programme.title: Georgie \u0026 Mandy's First Marriage
programme.desc: 1990s.Young married couple Georgie Cooper (Montana Jordan) and Mandy McAllister (Emily Osment) living in Texas are taking care of their several-month-old daughter CeeCee.The couple lives with the woman's parents, Audrey (Rachel Bay Jones) and Jim (Will Sasso), and her younger brother Connor (Dougie Baldwin).Every day, young parents face the challenges of adulthood, relationship life and parenthood.The third television series in the series "The Big Bang Theory", a direct continuation of "Young Sheldon".

programme.title: Doc Ii.
programme.desc: Dr. Amy Larsen, former chief of internal medicine, is rebuilding her life after a tragic accident that left her with no memory.Now she is an intern.Her past still haunts me.

programme.title: Dawn of the Dragon Racers
programme.desc: The dragon riders are preparing for the next showdown.At Dragon Academy, Snotlout launches sheep into the air.However, the animals end up in various places in the village, disturbing its inhabitants in their daily activities.On Stoick's orders, the young trainers chase them around the island on the backs of their dragons.The activity quickly turns into a competition.Finally, a race is organized with the participation of fluffy creatures that are released from the pastures especially for this occasion.The competition becomes the new official sport for equestrians.In the Polish language version, the characters were voiced by, among others:Grzegorz Drojewski, Artur Pontek, Sebastian Cybulski and Julia Kołakowska-Bytner.

programme.title: Her
programme.desc: Los Angeles.Theodore makes a living by writing letters to order.He experiences a painful divorce from Catherine.His friend Amy supports him in difficult times.He spends his free time playing computer games and occasional dates.One day he buys a new operating system that can meet all user needs.She uses the software's capabilities by communicating with a virtual character with a sensual voice, Samantha.He quickly realizes that this cybernetic consciousness understands him perfectly.He has great knowledge, sense of humor and feelings.Theodore realizes that he has met the ideal woman.Attempts are made to create an unconventional relationship.

credits.actor: Sexy Pregnant TV Star - May Lindstrom

programme.title: Ród smoka
programme.desc: The history of House Targaryen.Its leader, Viserys I (Paddy Considine), ruler of the Seven Kingdoms, decides to break with tradition.The king appoints his daughter, Princess Rhaenyra (Milly Alcock and Emma D'Arcy), as heir to the Iron Throne.This step leads to the initiation of a conflict within the family, called the Dance of Dragons.After the ruler's death, the fratricidal fight breaks out with renewed force.Also taking part in it are:Rhaenyra's brother, Aegon (Tom Glynn-Carney), and Alicent Hightower (Emily Carey and Olivia Cooke), the second wife of Viserys I. The events told in the series precede the action of "Game of Thrones" by 200 years.

programme.title: Heated Rivalry
programme.desc: Two ice hockey players, Shane Hollander (Hudson Williams) and Ilya Rozanov (Connor Storrie), are united not only by ambition and the need for competition, but also by a magnetic attraction that neither of them fully understands.What begins as a secret romance between two debutants turns into an extraordinary love journey.Athletes spend eight years chasing fame on the ice rink while trying to deal with their feelings off it.They must decide whether there is room for something as fragile as love in a world of brutal competition.

credits.actor: Man in the Crease Host #2 - Shaun Starr
Man in the Crease Host #1 - Conor McKenna

programme.title: Comeback 3
programme.desc: Valerie Cherish, a once popular television actress, rose to fame as a sitcom star.After many years, he wants to return to the small screen at all costs.He decides to take part in a new reality show.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg Russo (Steve Carell) has written a best-selling series of books, and readers identify him with his literary hero nicknamed Rooster.A famous writer comes to the university campus to support his daughter (Charly Clive) who is going through a marital crisis in a difficult moment.Her partner has just left her for a student, which everyone knows perfectly well.The situation is further complicated by scandals involving a woman who are the subject of gossip in the academic community.The father declares help, but his presence quickly reveals old conflicts and uncomfortable topics, instead of bringing the expected solution.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: The further fate of a group of friends who left school behind and entered adulthood.The action moves forward several years.Rue (Zendaya Coleman) is no longer a lost teenager, but a person involved in the criminal world.He goes to interrogation in connection with smuggling drugs from Mexico.Cassie (Sydney Sweeney) and Maddy's (Alexa Demie) relationship has improved, but old wounds haven't healed at all.The first woman's relationship with Nate (Jacob Elordi) develops, but not towards a happy ending.The remaining characters confront their own choices, addiction and violence.They are looking for redemption and answers to the question about their place in the world.

programme.title: Peacemaker 2
programme.desc: Two years have passed since the last events.Chris Smith (John Cena) considers himself a real hero.However, he must earn the recognition of other heroes.

programme.title: Blink Twice
programme.desc: At a charity event, waitress Frida (Naomi Ackie) meets billionaire tech mogul Slater King (Channing Tatum).Together with her friend Jess (Alia Shawkat), she accepts his invitation to a private island.On site are Slater's friends and business partners: photographer Vic (Christian Slater), private chef Cody (Simon Rex), DJ Tom (Haley Joel Osment), college graduate Lucas (Levon Hawke), reality star Sarah (Adria Arjona), aspiring app creator Camilla (Liz Caribel) and lawyer Heather (Trew Mullen).A holiday stay means crazy nights interspersed with sunny days.All the guests are having a great time.Until then.Mysterious events occur that make Frida grow anxious.She will have to find the truth to save her life.

programme.title: Kraven: The Hunter
programme.desc: Kraven (Aaron Taylor-Johnson), a hunter from Russia, is extremely strong and fast thanks to an extraordinary potion.He can hunt wild animals and always comes out victorious in battles with them.His life is overshadowed by his complicated relationship with his cruel father, Nikolai Kravinoff (Russell Crowe), who drags him into a spiral of revenge.Parent expects Kraven to become the greatest and most feared hunter in the world.To prove this, the young man must catch the spider-man.A slightly exaggerated, but suspenseful origin story of one of the most iconic anti-heroes of Marvel comics.

programme.title: True Story
programme.desc: Michael Finkel (Jonah Hill), a New York Times journalist, disgraced himself with an article whose hero - a slave trader in Mali - does not exist.The reporter is publicly humiliated and fired.So he returns to his hometown.He soon discovers that a man is impersonating him, accused of murdering his wife and three small children.Christian Longo (James Franco) is captured in Mexico.He agrees to meet with Finkel, who sees a chance to publish a best-selling novel and rehabilitate himself in the eyes of readers.However, it turns out that Longo has some plans for the journalist.She has been following his career for a long time.A story based on facts about the relationship between a psychopathic murderer and a disgraced journalist.

programme.title: Peacemaker 2
programme.desc: Two years have passed since the last events.Chris Smith (John Cena) considers himself a real hero.However, he must earn the recognition of other heroes.

programme.title: The Outrun
programme.desc: A young woman named Rona (Saoirse Ronan), who has recently left an addiction treatment center, returns from London to her native Scotland, to one of the islands of the Orkney archipelago.Because her parents are separated, she lives alternately with her mother, where she meets with her religious friends, and with her father, whom she helps on the farm.At the same time, she is still trying to cope with difficult memories - the beginning of her stay in London, where she started studying biology and often went to clubs with her boyfriend Daynin (Paapa Essiedu).She didn't even notice when she fell into alcoholism, which led to problems in her relationship and began to destroy her life.Meanwhile, while staying on the island, Rona decides to return to London.However, already on the ferry he feels that he is unable to control the urge to drink alcohol.He must re-plan his life.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: Secret of the Scroll
programme.desc: The helpless inhabitants of the villages in the Valley of Tranquility are terrorized by a powerful Boar.Shifu, who has just fallen ill, asks Tigress to bring four trained warriors to help him.During the journey, however, the envoy does not use the list prepared by the master, but a scroll created by Po.He has no idea that the notes concern... professions in which the young panda could pursue in the future.As a result of a mistake, Tigress brings to the Jade Palace: the cleaner Crane, the comedian Monkey, the dancer Viper and the doctor Mantis.Soon, the inconspicuous chosen ones become the Mighty Five.A short story about Po's adventures before he became the Dragon Warrior.It features characters known from the next three full-length parts of the famous animated series.

programme.title: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: A new school year begins at Hogwarts, the famous wizarding school.Harry Potter and his friend Ron Weasley have been unlucky from the beginning.They miss their train, so they take a flying car to get there.Unfortunately, they cause a crash, which angers Prof.Snape.It turns out that last year's feat, neutralizing Lord Voldemort, made Harry a hero.The young wizard is not happy about his sudden popularity.It does not help him concentrate on his studies and even makes enemies, including among teachers.Meanwhile, prof.Dumbledore warns that evil lurks within the walls of the academy.An ominous writing appears on the wall, declaring that the Chamber of Secrets has been opened.Students and teachers are in danger.Potter must find out what got out of the chamber and defeat the dark forces that have taken over Hogwarts.He is helped by his friends, Ron and Hermione.

programme.title: Saturday Night
programme.desc: New York, October 11, 1975.Aspiring producer Lorne Michaels (Gabriel LaBelle) arrives at the NBC studios to prepare the broadcast of the first episode of "Saturday Night".The man's superior, Dick Ebersol (Cooper Hoffman), immediately informs him that executive director David Tebet (Willem Dafoe) is skeptical about the new show.Meanwhile, there are constant misunderstandings between cast members on set.Garrett Morris (Lamorne Morris) is not happy with the role he was cast in, John Belushi (Matt Wood) cannot communicate with his co-workers and causes fights, as does Chevy Chase (Cory Michael Smith), who confronts Milton Berle (J.K. Simmons) because he is hitting on his girlfriend.Even host George Carlin (Matthew Rhys) thinks what he was asked to do is embarrassing.Additionally, everyone is wondering what type of program they should create.Resigned, Michaels goes to a local bar, where he meets comedy writer Alan Zweibel (Josh Brener).After a short conversation, she hires him to cooperate.The film was inspired by real events and its action covers 90 minutes preceding the first broadcast of the famous cyclical entertainment program.

programme.title: Jojo Rabbit
programme.desc: Set in Germany during World War II, the story of Jojo (Roman Griffin Davis), a member of the Hitler Youth.His best friend is an imaginary friend - Adolf Hitler (Taika Waititi).The boy asks him for advice on key issues, such as how to be the best little Nazi or how to recognize a Jew.One day, Jojo discovers that a Jewish teenager (Thomasin McKenzie) is hiding in his house with the consent of his single mother (Scarlett Johansson).His world turns upside down, and his current views clash with his sympathy for the girl he just met.A moving but also funny story about a young German coming of age during the Holocaust.The director, screenwriter and actor of the role of Hitler is Taika Waititi.The film won an Oscar in the best adapted screenplay category.He also received five nominations for this prestigious award.

programme.title: Ballers 3
programme.desc: Legendary American football player, Spencer Strasmore (Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson), ends his football career and starts working as a sports consultant.A comedy series that reveals the behind-the-scenes life of competitors of one of the most popular sports in the USA.On the one hand, the heroes live at a high standard, but on the other hand, they have to struggle with enormous pressure.The main roles were played by: Dwayne Johnson ("The Scorpion King", "Barbell and Cash"), Omar Benson Miller ("8th Mile", "The Sorcerer's Apprentice"), Rob Corddry ("Fur Tomorrow", "Forever Alive") and Taylor Cole ("Surrogates", the series "The Event").

programme.title: Ballers 3
programme.desc: Legendary American football player, Spencer Strasmore (Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson), ends his football career and starts working as a sports consultant.A comedy series that reveals the behind-the-scenes life of competitors of one of the most popular sports in the USA.On the one hand, the heroes live at a high standard, but on the other hand, they have to struggle with enormous pressure.The main roles were played by: Dwayne Johnson ("The Scorpion King", "Barbell and Cash"), Omar Benson Miller ("8th Mile", "The Sorcerer's Apprentice"), Rob Corddry ("Fur Tomorrow", "Forever Alive") and Taylor Cole ("Surrogates", the series "The Event").

programme.title: Benchwarmers 2: Breaking Balls
programme.desc: Ben McGrath (Chris Klein) has great potential and a chance for a career in a professional baseball league.Unfortunately, his hopes for the game are ruined by an unfortunate accident.So the would-be athlete becomes a lawyer and gets a job at the Schmood & Associates law firm.One day, however, he gets a chance to return to the field.His unconventional boss, Mel Carmichael (Jon Lovitz), convinces him to form a softball team of his co-workers.Ben undertakes this task, although he realizes that creating an effective team from a group of eccentric lawyers is quite a challenge.

programme.title: Fantastic Mr. Fox
programme.desc: Since his unsuccessful attack on one of the farms, Mr. Fox has been leading a quiet, boring life.Under the influence of his wife, he settled down, gave up working on the border of the law and started writing articles for a local newspaper.However, his instincts do not allow him to sit still for long.Soon, together with his friend Szop, he comes up with a plan to attack three large farms.The friends brilliantly rob Walter Boggis, Franklin Bean and Nathan Bunce.However, people do not remain idle and quickly develop a plan for revenge.Mr. Fox must fight for the life not only of himself and his loved ones, but also of other persecuted creatures.Wes Anderson, responsible for the film, was nominated for an Oscar in 2001 for his screenplay for "Brilliant Clan"."Fantastic Mr. Fox" is his animated debut.The director's credits include the award-winning comedy "The Grand Budapest Hotel."The film received nine Oscar nominations, including:in the following categories: best film, script, music, cinematography and editing.He also won a Golden Globe statuette.The Polish language version was attended by, among others:Grzegorz Wons, Agnieszka Kunikowska, Artur Pontek, Piotr Bajtlik and Krzysztof Szczerbiński.

programme.title: Ready Jet Go: Space Camp The Movie
programme.desc: Jet surfs the comet's tail with his pet, Sunspot.Unfortunately, it turns out that the pet is allergic to comet dust and begins to shrink.Jet and his friends must find a cure quickly.

programme.title: True Story
programme.desc: Michael Finkel (Jonah Hill), a New York Times journalist, disgraced himself with an article whose hero - a slave trader in Mali - does not exist.The reporter is publicly humiliated and fired.So he returns to his hometown.He soon discovers that a man is impersonating him, accused of murdering his wife and three small children.Christian Longo (James Franco) is captured in Mexico.He agrees to meet with Finkel, who sees a chance to publish a best-selling novel and rehabilitate himself in the eyes of readers.However, it turns out that Longo has some plans for the journalist.She has been following his career for a long time.A story based on facts about the relationship between a psychopathic murderer and a disgraced journalist.

programme.title: Industry
programme.desc: Harper Stern (Myha'la Herrold) moves to London from a small town in upstate New York.He takes up a job at a major international bank, Pierpoint & Co.She really wants to prove herself to her superiors and do better than her peers.However, he quickly comes face to face with the brutal reality.He discovers that in the fight for a job it is not only competence that counts, but also origin.People from privileged families have much greater opportunities.However, this does not take away from her enthusiasm and motivates her even more to try to get her dream job.Together with other graduates from his age group, he learns about the hierarchical realities of the industry.Young people fall into the ruthless corporate machine where no one trusts anyone, and everyone, regardless of ethical issues, tries to take the place of their colleagues in a better position.

programme.title: The Great
programme.desc: A continuation of the story about Tsarina Catherine (Elle Fanning), in which facts mix with satire.After the woman recently tried to kill her husband, Piotr (Nicholas Hoult), and imprisoned all his friends, the relationship between them is not good.Meanwhile, Katarzyna also faces political problems.Wanting to solve them, the ruler becomes famous also outside Russia.During this time, Piotr tries to accept the fact that he lives in his wife's shadow.He devotes himself to fatherhood, takes part in hunting and discovers culinary novelties.Finally, they both decide to take a responsible step - they decide to save their marriage Katarzyna feels remorse for stabbing Pukachev.The ruler also begins to notice how important it is to be familiar with politics.She decides to become her champion.She hopes that Aunt Elizabeth and Archie will help her with this.Orlo is furious that Peter is still alive.He, in turn, hesitates whether he should continue to do only what he wants or obey Katarzyna.So first he frees his friends who are waiting to be executed, but eventually he brings them back.Georgina, on the other hand, declares her loyalty to Catherine.To test this, the ruler orders her to be the first to shoot at the prisoners.
